passiveAbilities.name: Bludgeon
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Slicing or Piercing Melee Dmg, reduce the Dmg to W. If this character deals Impact Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

passiveAbilities.name: Rub It Better
passiveAbilities.description: When this model causes 1 or more Wds to an enemy, a friendly Human or Cleric within 4" of this model may restore 1 Wd.

passiveAbilities.name: Divine Intervention
passiveAbilities.description: When an enemy targets this character with an Arcane Ability, or uses an Arcane Ability within 4” of this model, if your resist hand includes two or more Catastrophe cards, you may reveal them to cancel the ability and inflict the catastrophe result on the active character.

arcaneAbilities.name: Healing
arcaneAbilities.description:
[B]X: Target restores X+1 Wds.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Spank
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If this character was not slain then it restores 1 Wd.
